page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by lower scores in stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests, as well as single-threaded gzip compression. However, the 32 dedicated physical cores deliver average multi-core performance across stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark CPU suites. Memory bandwidth benchmarks for both cached and uncached read/write operations also fall within the average range, though the overall Passmark memory score is positioned in the lower tier.

From a workload perspective, the ecs.sn1.7xlarge is suited for multi-threaded applications that can leverage its 32 dedicated cores without requiring high memory-to-CPU ratios. It demonstrates average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving. Additionally, it supports moderate LLM inference tasks, achieving average token generation speeds on medium-sized 7B models. This hardware profile is appropriate for parallel processing tasks, software compilation, and multi-threaded web serving where single-core speed is not the primary bottleneck.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it provides 64.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. Benchmark data shows weak single-core performance but average multi-core capabilities in stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark tests. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform at average levels. This resource profile is suited for multi-threaded workloads, software compilation, static web serving, and moderate database operations that benefit from dedicated parallel processing cores without requiring high memory density.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.7xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A compute-optimized instance featuring thirty-two dedicated cores and balanced multi-threaded performance for parallel processing and web serving workloads.
